text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text: I move through life with a single belief—that I am beautiful. It's my philosophical aesthetic, my raison d'etre.

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
To fully commit to the magnum opus of my
beauty, I must therefore... smash every barrier in
our infinite universe!

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Fear not, I shall clear the debris of my destruction
and restore everything to perfection.

text_block_list.name: Tanino Gimlet
text_block_list.text:
Heh, my hammer work is a thing of wonder. Care
to witness it?
